home.title: SmallPush - CiviCRM Consulting for NGOs & Political Parties
home.description: Experts in rapid CiviCRM implementation. We help NGOs and political parties centralize data, manage donors, and boost impact in record time.
home.keywords: CiviCRM, Payment Methods, Stripe, Redsys, Drupal, CRM, Non-profit, political parties, rapid implementation

hero.subtitle: Empowering your organization with CiviCRM: centralize contacts, automate processes, and dedicate more time to your mission.
hero.tagline: Technology specialists for projects with social impact.

about.title: Why SmallPush
about.text: With over 14 years of experience in technology for the non-profit sector and political organizations, we help you bring order to your social base, automate tasks, and deploy CiviCRM in a fast, robust manner tailored to your real needs.

civi.title: CiviCRM Consulting & Implementation
civi.text: Agile and strategic deployments so your organization can leverage its data from day one.
civi.details: We implement CiviCRM tailored to your real workflows. From membership management and donation acquisition to bulk email campaigns and automation of repetitive processes, ensuring your team has full and secure control over your social base.

drupal.title: Drupal Development
drupal.text: Robust and scalable Drupal websites and applications.
drupal.details: We develop high-performance and highly secure web portals. We specialize in complex integrations between Drupal and CiviCRM, creating private member areas, intranets, and content platforms that scale with your organization's growth.

payment.title: Spanish Payments Ecosystem
payment.text: Expert integration with Spanish payment gateways and banking systems.
payment.details: We connect your CRM with major payment gateways (Redsys, Stripe, PayPal, SEPA). We automate bank reconciliation, recurring payment management, and refunds, drastically reducing manual work for your administrative team.

fiscal.title: Fiscal Models Management
fiscal.text: Solutions for managing fiscal data and generating tax reports (e.g., Model 182).
fiscal.details: We simplify your administrative burden by automating the generation of tax models and donation certificates. We guarantee that all fiscal data extracted from the CRM strictly complies with current tax agency regulations.

ads.title: Ads Development
ads.text: Customer acquisition campaigns optimized to maximize conversion.
ads.details: We design and execute digital acquisition strategies focused on results. We track the complete user journey from the ad to the CRM, allowing you to measure the real acquisition cost of each new member or donor.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.text: Implementation of Artificial Intelligence solutions to automate and empower your business.
ai.details: We apply AI (LLMs, LangChain) to create conversational agents that interact with your followers, resolve complex doubts based on your documents, and automatically qualify leads, integrating all data directly into your CRM.

quote.title: Request a Quote
quote.subtitle: Build your custom project estimate in seconds.

result.title: Estimated Cost:
result.disclaimer: *This is a rough estimate. Contact us for a detailed quote.

civi.small: Resolution of specific issues or basic configuration of an extension.
civi.medium: CiviCRM installation, initial setup, and data import of a small database.
civi.large: Development of a complex workflow with custom integrations and a member portal.

drupal.small: Security updates or small design tweaks on an existing theme.
drupal.medium: Development of a custom landing page or setup of new content types.
drupal.large: Creation of a full web portal from scratch with custom design and data migration.

payment.small: Standard configuration of Stripe or PayPal without complex customizations.
payment.medium: Integration of a payment processor (e.g., Redsys) with 3 rounds of client revisions.
payment.large: Development of a recurring payments system, bank reconciliation, and multiple gateways.

fiscal.small: Quick adjustments to the export format of an existing fiscal model.
fiscal.medium: Generation or revision of Model 182 adapted to current regulations.
fiscal.large: Full automation of fiscal models, donation certificates, and data processing.

ads.small: Quick audit of existing campaigns or basic initial setup.
ads.medium: Setup of 2-3 new campaigns with conversion tracking and Google Analytics.
ads.large: Comprehensive multi-channel acquisition strategy and custom advanced dashboards.

ai.small: Technical consultation on feasibility or quick test script with the OpenAI API.
ai.medium: Integration of a smart chatbot into your web trained with your own documents (FAQ).
ai.large: Orchestration of advanced agents (LLMs) to automate complex processes in the CRM.

seo.title: Event funnel for nonprofits and foundations - SmallPush
seo.description: Landing page, attendee registration, attendance tracking and payments for nonprofit events.

hero.badge: Events with registration, attendance and payments
hero.title: Turn your events into an organized acquisition and follow-up system
hero.subtitle: We build an event landing page connected to your CRM so you can promote activities, register attendees, collect tickets or donations, and know who actually attended.

registration.title: Registration without spreadsheets
registration.text: Centralize attendee data, guests, preferences and consent through a clear, measurable form.

payments.title: Payments linked to the event
payments.text: Collect tickets, donations or fees and keep every transaction tied to the right person and activity.

attendance.title: Verifiable attendance
attendance.text: Track check-in, no-shows and participation so follow-up communications use real data.

journey.title: The full attendee journey
journey.subtitle: From the first click to post-event follow-up, with less manual work for your team.

step1.title: Attraction
step1.text: A landing page focused on one action: reserve a seat, buy a ticket or confirm interest.

step2.title: Registration and payment
step2.text: An event-specific form with fields, capacity, amounts and automatic confirmations.

step3.title: Check-in
step3.text: An operational list for reception, attendee validation and no-show tracking.

step4.title: Follow-up
step4.text: Segments to send thanks, share materials, request donations or invite people to the next event.

deliverables.title: What we build
deliverables.item5: Dashboard for registered, paid and attended contacts

cta.title: Do you have an upcoming event?
cta.text: We can turn it into a repeatable flow to acquire attendees, measure results and keep the relationship alive after the event.

narrative.title: From Followers to Ambassadors
narrative.text: Transforming social interactions into real impact through conversational AI and CRM architecture.

meta.title: Meta API
meta.desc: Captures real-time comments & DMs via Webhooks.

fastapi.title: FastAPI
fastapi.desc: Python microservice bridging social events to AI.

symfony.title: Symfony
symfony.desc: Robust CRM securely storing profiles & history.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Consideration
phase3.desc: RAG Agent answering complex questions via DMs.
